content.json:
# Azure Activity — Lab Overview
Control-plane activity ingested into this workspace through the Azure Activity connector. Adjust the time range with the workbook time picker.

content.query:
AzureActivity
| summarize Events = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Activity events over time

content.query:
AzureActivity
| summarize Operations = count() by Caller
| top 10 by Operations desc
content.title: Top 10 callers

content.query:
AzureActivity
| where ActivityStatusValue in ('Failed', 'Failure')
| summarize Failures = count() by OperationNameValue, ResourceGroup
| top 15 by Failures desc
content.title: Failed operations
